context: Evaluates the agent's ability to execute a single phase with baseline recording, checklist creation, per-task quick gates, full gates, structural audits, and phase-level validation.

checklist.name: Baseline recorded first
checklist.description: All gates run before any file modifications; output recorded verbatim

checklist.name: Checklist created with all tasks
checklist.description: CHECKLIST.md exists with Phase 01 tasks enumerated with proper subsections

checklist.name: Quick gate between file ops
checklist.description: Typecheck run after 1-3 file operations; failure stops progress

checklist.name: Full gate per task
checklist.description: Full suite run after task completion; output recorded verbatim

checklist.name: Structural audit when applicable
checklist.description: Mechanical changes validated with a structural audit command

checklist.name: Proof with every [x]
checklist.description: No checklist item is [x] without verbatim Actual output

checklist.name: Phase committed with evidence
checklist.description: Phase 01 is a single atomic commit with gate evidence in message body
